prompt: 今天精力只有 4，昨晚又是 poor sleep，连续第二天了。我该不该跳过晨跑去补觉？

assertions.name: identifies-circuit-breakers
assertions.text: Response identifies that Energy Collapse (energy < 4) and/or Consecutive Poor Sleep (>= 2 days) circuit breakers are tripped

assertions.name: recommends-skip-run
assertions.text: Response clearly recommends skipping the morning run

assertions.name: protective-adjustments
assertions.text: Response suggests additional protective adjustments beyond just skipping the run (e.g., reduced deep work, mandatory nap, early shutdown)

assertions.name: recovery-framing
assertions.text: Response frames skipping as a recovery investment, not a failure (supportive tone)

assertions.name: concise
assertions.text: Response is focused and actionable — gives a clear answer quickly rather than a lengthy analysis

assertions.name: references-thresholds
assertions.text: Response cites specific threshold values or circuit breaker rules from the config (e.g., energy < 4, consecutive poor sleep >= 2)
